title: tephrosia lortii
intro: Tephrosia lortii, also known as Lort's Tephrosia or Konduru Tella, is a perennial plant species native to India, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Tephrosia lortii include reducing fever, relieving cough and congestion, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves, roots, or flowers, and can be consumed as teas, decoctions, or powders.
